Pariprashnena — Q&A Archive

A read-only archive of 1,235 questions and 14,977 answers from a Gauḍīya Vaiṣṇava forum (2007–2012).

why pure devotees have to endure so much suffering?

Philosophy · asked by user [] · 2007-09-22 · 3 answers
See Pandavas, Prahlada Maharaj, Srila Haridas Thakur etc etc. even Jesus.
user [154] · 2007-09-24
It would be different for each level of devotees.

For beginners its to show how distasteful this material world is.
For devotees who are little advanced is to cause them to remember the shelter of the Supreme person.
For devotees who are recipients of His special mercy he will take away everything that stops them from complete surrender.
For a very advanced devotees like Kunti, it will cause them to be in constant association with Krsna in person.
For ultimate devotees, such as gopis, the suffering is bringing out sublime rasa.
user [153] · 2007-09-22
material world sucks!
user [38] · 2007-09-22
My view is that Lord wants to use them as examples of staunch faith to glorify them and draw greater attention to them. (found a ref: CC 3.10.101)
